zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Clipsby於1405年出生在英國諾福爾可利德哈姆時，她的父親Esq. John Clipsby23歲，母親Alice Longstruther15歲。她於1425年與Esquire Thomas Berney在英國英格蘭諾福爾可維其加姆結婚。他們至少是7個女兒的父母。她去世於1474年在她的家鄉享年69歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾帕克 霍爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Clipsby于1405年出生在英国諾福爾可利德哈姆时，她的父亲Esq. John Clipsby23岁，母亲Alice Longstruther15岁。她于1425年与Esquire Thomas Berney在英国英格兰諾福爾可維其加姆结婚。他们至少是7个女儿的父母。她去世于1474年在她的家乡享年69岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾帕克 霍爾。

nameMeanings.name: Clipsby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Clipsby was born in 1405, in Reedham, Norfolk, England, her father, Esq. John Clipsby, was 23 and her mother, Alice Longstruther, was 15. She married Esquire Thomas Berney in 1425, in Witchingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 daughters. She died in 1474, in her hometown, at the age of 69, and was buried in Park Hall, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Clipsby est née en 1405, à Reedham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Esq. John Clipsby, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Alice Longstruther, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Esquire Thomas Berney en 1425, à Witchingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 filles. Elle est décédée en 1474, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Park Hall, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Clipsby 1405 in Reedham, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Esq. John Clipsby 23 und ihre Mutter Alice Longstruther 15. Sie hat 1425 in Witchingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Esquire Thomas Berney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Töchter. Sie starb 1474 im Alter von 69 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Park Hall, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Clipsby è nata il nel 1405 nel Reedham, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Esq. John Clipsby, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Alice Longstruther, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Esquire Thomas Berney nel 1425, nel Witchingham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figlie. Morì nel 1474, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a Park Hall, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Clipsbyが1405年にイギリスノーフォルクレエドハムで生まれた時，父Esq. John Clipsbyは23歳，母Alice Longstrutherは15歳であった。1425年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクウィトチンガムでEsquire Thomas Berneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1474年に故郷で69歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアパーク ハルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Clipsby(이)가 1405년 영국 노르폴크 리드함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Esq. John Clipsby(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Longstruther(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1425년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 윗친그함에서 Esquire Thomas Berney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1474년 그녀의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 박 홀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Clipsby nasceu em 1405, em Reedham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Esq. John Clipsby, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Alice Longstruther, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Esquire Thomas Berney em 1425, em Witchingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1474, em sua cidade natal, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Park Hall, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Clipsby родилась в 1405 г. в местности ридхам, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Esq. John Clipsby было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Longstruther, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Esquire Thomas Berney в 1425 г. в местности вичингхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 дочерей. Она умерла в 1474 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности парк холл, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Clipsby nació en 1405, en Reedham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Esq. John Clipsby, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Alice Longstruther, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Esquire Thomas Berney en 1425, en Witchingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijas. Murió en 1474, en su pueblo, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Park Hall, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
